creator: stask@tiger.unisquad.com
text:
Hi.

It looks like kmem_malloc() is not the one who returns wrong pointer
to m_mballoc(), but it is one of MGET()/MGETHDR()/MFREE() spoiling mmbfree,
and thus MGET()/MGETHDR() return wrong pointer in various places.

I've added ever more logging to see who of them is the killer, and I'll
post results tomorrow.

\bye
Stas
